mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dm ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM dm WHERE dm_level >= #{level} ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM dm WHERE dm_level >= #{level} AND status = 'AVAILABLE' ORDER BY rating DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dm(user_id, dm_level, experience, rating, status, specialty, total_sessions, weekly_max_sessions, bio) VALUES(#{userId}, #{dmLevel}, #{experience}, #{rating}, #{status}, #{specialty}, #{totalSessions}, #{weeklyMaxSessions}, #{bio})
